welcome_title: You are warmly welcome to our wedding
welcome_when: Saturday 3 April 2027 · the ceremony begins at 15:00
location_body: We'll begin with a ceremony in Kulturens trädgård, then walk together to Tegnérs matsalar to continue the celebration. It's about a three-minute walk between the two.
location_map_note: A map is coming here later — both venues and the short walk between.
dress_body: Come dressed in a way you feel comfortable in. A few examples:
dress_ex4: a jumpsuit, or a skirt and top
dress_avoid: Please avoid solid black or white dresses.
speeches_body1: Many of our friends and family are talented musicians and gifted speakers. The venue has a stage, and we warmly encourage speeches, music, and other performances.
speeches_body2: For speeches, please try to keep it fairly short so we can hear everyone who'd like to speak — around five minutes is a good length.
speeches_body3: If you'd like to speak or perform, let us know in the free-text field of the RSVP form.
gifts_body1: Your being there is what we wish for most, and it is more than enough.
gifts_body2: If you'd still like to give a gift, we'd be glad for something simple, something artistic, something consumable — or a contribution to our honeymoon to northern Italy.
rsvp_section_body: Please let us know whether you can join us by 3 February 2027. Open your personal link to reply below.
contact_body: You're welcome to reach either of us.
admin_error: Det gick inte att spara inbjudan. Vänligen försök igen.
load_error: Kunde inte ladda in din inbjudan. Vänligen kontrollera din länk.
rsvp_intro_one: Berätta för oss vilka som kommer. Du kan ta med dig upp till {max} gäst{min_clause}.
rsvp_intro_other: Berätta för oss vilka som kommer. Du kan ta med dig upp till {max} gäster{min_clause}.
submit_error: Det gick inte att skicka. Vänligen försök igen.
thank_you_body: Ditt svar har skickats. Vi ses på bröllopet!
